fields.helpText: This is a unique ID assigned to each PROJECTION X-RAY DOSE instance.
The dosage is an estimate if the instance is not sourced from an RT object.
This is the total procedure time in seconds for this projection x-ray dose instance.

This is the dose area product for this projection x-ray dose instance. Dose area product is defined as the air kerma at a particular location in an  x-ray beam, multiplied by the cross-sectional area of the beam at that  location. It is an approximate indication of the total amount of energy  delivered by the x-ray beam. Unit: Gy-cm2 (Gray centimeters square).
This is the image series associated with this PROJECTION X-RAY DOSE instance.
Total dose related to reference point (RP) for this projection x-ray dose instance. Unit: mGy (milligray).
Calculated accumulated dose at the reference point applied during fluoroscopy for this projection x-ray dose instance. Unit: mGy (milligray).
Total calculated Dose Area Product applied in fluoroscopy modes for this projection x-ray dose instance. Unit: Gy-cm2 (Gray centimeters square).
Total CINE dose related to reference point (RP) for this projection x-ray dose instance. Unit: mGy (milligray).
Calculated accumulated dose at the reference point applied during CINE imaging for this projection x-ray dose instance. Unit: Gy-cm2 (Gray centimeters square).
The amount of CINE TIME measured in seconds, represented as a decimal string in the form of xxxxxx.yyy or xxxe=-zzz for this projection x-ray dose instance.
